name: Blob Sketch → Image
description: Transform a soft-body blob arrangement into a polished illustration. Capture your blob canvas first, then run this workflow to stylize it.

concept.label: What are the blobs depicting?
concept.placeholder: e.g. a snowman, a cat, a smiley face

params.prompt: Describe the composition and shape arrangement in this soft-body blob art. What shapes are present, how are they arranged, and what concept might they be depicting?
{{params.style}} of {{params.concept}}. Inspired by the composition: {{analyze.description}}. Soft, rounded, organic shapes. Vivid colors, clean background.
Reimagine this as an even more expressive {{params.style}} with bold colors and playful energy
